records.description: Java ClassNotFoundException — add cwd and lib to CLASSPATH

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Exception in thread \"main\" java.lang.ClassNotFoundException: com.example.Missing" >&2; exit 1'

records.description: Java NoClassDefFoundError — extend CLASSPATH to include build output

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Exception in thread \"main\" java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: org/slf4j/LoggerFactory" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: Could not resolve dependencies|Could not find artifact
records.description: Maven dependency resolution failure — use local repo override

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "[ERROR] Could not resolve dependencies for project com.myapp:myapp:jar:1.0" >&2; exit 1'

records.description: Java compilation error: package not found — add jars to compilation classpath

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error: package org.apache.commons.lang3 does not exist" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: Could not find .+ in any of the configured repositories|Could not resolve all files for configuration
records.description: Gradle dependency not found in configured repositories — retry or check repository config

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Could not find io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-api:0.12.3 in any of the configured repositories" >&2; exit 1'
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: Could not find .+ in any of the configured repositories
